zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Conyers於1544年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，他的父親Sir George Conyers35歲，母親Anne Dawney29歲。他於1575年與Agnes Bowes在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1610年2月10日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年66歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆索可本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Conyers于1544年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆时，他的父亲Sir George Conyers35岁，母亲Anne Dawney29岁。他于1575年与Agnes Bowes在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1610年2月10日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年66岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆索可本。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Conyers was born in 1544, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir George Conyers, was 35 and his mother, Anne Dawney, was 29. He married Agnes Bowes in 1575, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 10 February 1610, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Sockburn, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Conyers est né en 1544, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir George Conyers, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anne Dawney, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Bowes en 1575, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 10 février 1610, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Conyers 1544 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir George Conyers 35 und seine Mutter Anne Dawney 29. Er hat 1575 in Yorkshire, England Agnes Bowes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Februar 1610 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sockburn, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Conyers è nato il nel 1544 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir George Conyers, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Anne Dawney, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Bowes nel 1575, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 10 febbraio 1610, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Sockburn, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Conyersが1544年にイギリスイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Sir George Conyersは35歳，母Anne Dawneyは29歳であった。1575年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでAgnes Bowesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1610年2月10日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで66歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムソクブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Conyers(이)가 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir George Conyers(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Dawney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1575년 영국 요르크실르에서 Agnes Bowes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 속번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Conyers nasceu em 1544, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir George Conyers, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anne Dawney, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Bowes em 1575, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1610, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Conyers родился в 1544 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir George Conyers было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Dawney, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Bowes в 1575 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 10 февраля 1610 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Conyers nació en 1544, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir George Conyers, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anne Dawney, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnes Bowes en 1575, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1610, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra.
